---
title: "git_trainer.ts"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\pennyone\intel\git_trainer.ts"
loc: 33
complexity: 5
logic_score: 7.70
style_score: 3.73
intel_score: 6.85
overall_score: 5.83
---

## Intent
The `git_trainer.ts` module analyzes historical git commit data to establish the 'lifetime gravity' of repository files. By calculating edit frequency and churn over the entire history, it seeds the initial gravitational weights into the system, identifying high-volatility sectors.

## Interaction Protocol
Invoke the `seedGitGravity` function to perform a one-time historical weight synchronization. This function updates the `gravity.db` with values derived from the git log.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.7/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.8/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 10 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [execa](file://execa)
- [registry](file://../pathRegistry.ts)
- [setFileGravity](file://./gravity_db.ts)
- [*](file://chalk)
- [*](file://path)

### Exports
- `seedGitGravity`
- `seedGitGravity`
- `root`
- `execa`
- `lines`
- `frequencies`
- `trimmed`
- `absolutePath`
- `seededCount`
- `isMain`
